faq.title: ❓ Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does the booking process work?
faq.a1: Fill in the quote form or contact us directly on WhatsApp. Our team quickly sends available options, prices and conditions. After confirmation and payment, your booking is guaranteed!
faq.a2: We accept Pix, bank transfer and credit card (installments available). Specific conditions are arranged directly with our team via WhatsApp.
faq.q3: Can I cancel or change my booking?
faq.a3: Yes. Cancellation and change policies vary by resort and season. Contact our team to confirm your specific conditions before booking.
faq.a4: Pet policy varies by resort. Some accept small pets and others do not. Ask our team when requesting your quote.
faq.a5: It depends on the selected package. Some resorts include breakfast, others charge separately. Let us know your preference when requesting a quote.
faq.a6: Most partner resorts provide free parking for guests. Confirm availability with our team for your chosen resort.
faq.q7: What is the booking confirmation time?
faq.a7: After quote request via WhatsApp, our team replies within up to 2 business hours. Final confirmation happens after payment confirmation.
pwa.installText: Get faster access with a native-like mobile experience.
